_note: Records seeded from known authoritative sources. Fields marked null indicate data not available in cited source. All records must be re-verified against live sources before production use.

_data_collection_instructions.PMBJP: https://janaushadhi.gov.in/ProductList.aspx — Download the official product catalog PDF

medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution in severe renal impairment
medicines.description: Crocin is a medical formulation containing Paracetamol as its active salt. It is classified under Analgesic / Antipyretic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Fever, Mild to moderate pain.

contraindications: Severe renal impairment (CrCl <30 mL/min) without dose adjustment
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction required in renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution; monitor liver function
medicines.description: Augmentin is a medical formulation containing Amoxicillin + Clavulanate as its active salt. It is classified under Antibiotic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Bacterial infections, Respiratory tract infections.

medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment (eGFR <30)
medicines.liver_risk: Avoid in hepatic impairment due to lactic acidosis risk
medicines.description: Metformin 500 is a medical formulation containing Metformin Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic (Biguanide) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus.

medicines.kidney_risk: Avoid in severe renal impairment
medicines.description: Ecosprin is a medical formulation containing Aspirin as its active salt. It is classified under Antiplatelet / NSAID and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Prevention of cardiovascular events, Antiplatelet therapy.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment needed in renal impairment
medicines.description: Atorva is a medical formulation containing Atorvastatin as its active salt. It is classified under Statin / Lipid-lowering and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypercholesterolemia, Prevention of cardiovascular disease.

uses: Cardiovascular risk reduction in patients with established cardiovascular disease
medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution; monitor potassium and renal function
medicines.description: Telma is a medical formulation containing Telmisartan as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive (ARB) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Cardiovascular risk reduction in patients with established cardiovascular disease.

contraindications: Known hypersensitivity to pantoprazole or benzimidazoles
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Pan is a medical formulation containing Pantoprazole Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under Proton Pump Inhibitor (PPI) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), Peptic ulcer disease.

contraindications: Children and adolescents (growing age, unless no alternative)
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction required in CrCl < 30 mL/min
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Ciprofloxacin 500 is a medical formulation containing Ciprofloxacin as its active salt. It is classified under Antibiotic (Fluoroquinolone) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Urinary tract infections, Respiratory tract infections.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Initiate at lower dose in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Amlodipine 5 is a medical formulation containing Amlodipine as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive (Calcium Channel Blocker) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Stable and vasospastic angina.

contraindications: Hypersensitivity to levetiracetam or pyrrolidone derivatives
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction required in renal impairment (CrCl < 80 mL/min)
medicines.liver_risk: No dose adjustment required in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Levipil is a medical formulation containing Levetiracetam as its active salt. It is classified under Antiepileptic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Partial onset seizures, Myoclonic seizures.

medicines.kidney_risk: No specific renal dose adjustment documented
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Thyronorm is a medical formulation containing Levothyroxine Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under Thyroid Hormone and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypothyroidism, TSH suppression in thyroid cancer.

side_effects: Behavioral and mood changes (FDA Black Box Warning)
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in moderate to severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Montair is a medical formulation containing Montelukast Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under Leukotriene Receptor Antagonist and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Asthma prophylaxis, Allergic rhinitis.

medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment
medicines.description: Glycomet is a medical formulation containing Metformin Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic (Biguanide) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus.

medicines.kidney_risk: Reduce dosing interval in renal impairment
medicines.description: Dolo 650 is a medical formulation containing Paracetamol as its active salt. It is classified under Analgesic / Antipyretic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Fever, Pain.

contraindications: Hypersensitivity to omeprazole or substituted benzimidazoles
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Omez is a medical formulation containing Omeprazole as its active salt. It is classified under Proton Pump Inhibitor (PPI) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Peptic ulcer, GERD.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required for mild-moderate renal impairment
medicines.description: Azithral is a medical formulation containing Azithromycin as its active salt. It is classified under Antibiotic (Macrolide) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Community-acquired pneumonia, Skin infections.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Clopivas is a medical formulation containing Clopidogrel as its active salt. It is classified under Antiplatelet and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Acute coronary syndrome, Recent MI.

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in CrCl < 60 mL/min
medicines.liver_risk: No dose adjustment documented in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Taxim-O is a medical formulation containing Cefixime as its active salt. It is classified under Antibiotic (3rd Gen Cephalosporin) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of UTI, Otitis media.

uses: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (adjunct to diet and exercise)
contraindications: History of serious hypersensitivity to sitagliptin
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction required: 50mg for CrCl 30-50; 25mg for CrCl <30
medicines.liver_risk: No dose adjustment required in mild-moderate hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Januvia is a medical formulation containing Sitagliptin as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic (DPP-4 Inhibitor) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (adjunct to diet and exercise).

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in renal impairment (CrCl <50 mL/min)
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.source_name: J B Chemicals India SmPC / DailyMed
medicines._note: CDSCO suspended approvals for ranitidine in 2020 due to NDMA contamination. Check CDSCO for current status before inclusion in product.
medicines.description: Rantac is a medical formulation containing Ranitidine as its active salt. It is classified under H2 Blocker and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Peptic ulcer, GERD.

medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment; can cause acute kidney injury
medicines.description: Ibugesic is a medical formulation containing Ibuprofen as its active salt. It is classified under NSAID / Analgesic / Antipyretic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Mild to moderate pain, Fever.

medicines.kidney_risk: Avoid in renal impairment due to ibuprofen component
medicines.liver_risk: Avoid in hepatic impairment due to paracetamol component
medicines.source_name: Sanofi India SmPC / Tata 1mg product listing
medicines.description: Combiflam is a medical formulation containing Ibuprofen + Paracetamol as its active salt. It is classified under NSAID + Analgesic Combination and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Fever, Musculoskeletal pain.

medicines.kidney_risk: AVOID — NSAIDs can cause acute renal failure especially in volume-depleted patients
medicines.liver_risk: Diclofenac has highest hepatotoxicity risk among common NSAIDs; contraindicated in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Diclofenac 50 is a medical formulation containing Diclofenac Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under NSAID and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid arthritis.

medicines.kidney_risk: Avoid in renal impairment
medicines.description: Zerodol SP is a medical formulation containing Aceclofenac + Paracetamol + Serratiopeptidase as its active salt. It is classified under NSAID + Analgesic + Proteolytic Enzyme Combination and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Musculoskeletal pain, Post-operative inflammation.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Dose reduction in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Metoprolol 25 is a medical formulation containing Metoprolol Succinate as its active salt. It is classified under Beta-1 Selective Adrenergic Blocker and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Angina pectoris.

medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution; large doses may be needed in renal failure
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic cirrhosis; risk of hepatic coma
medicines.description: Lasix is a medical formulation containing Furosemide as its active salt. It is classified under Loop Diuretic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Oedema (cardiac, renal, hepatic), Hypertension.

medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment; hypoglycaemia risk
medicines.description: Glimepiride 2 is a medical formulation containing Glimepiride as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic (Sulfonylurea) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus.

uses: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus where monotherapy inadequate
medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment (metformin component)
medicines.description: Glycomet GP 2 is a medical formulation containing Metformin + Glimepiride as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic Combination (Biguanide + Sulfonylurea) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus where monotherapy inadequate.

uses: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus as add-on to diet/exercise or adjunct to other antidiabetics
medicines.kidney_risk: Contraindicated in moderate-severe renal impairment (eGFR <45)
medicines.description: Janumet 50/500 is a medical formulation containing Sitagliptin + Metformin as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic Combination (DPP-4 Inhibitor + Biguanide) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus as add-on to diet/exercise or adjunct to other antidiabetics.

uses: Reduction of cardiovascular death in T2DM with CVD
medicines.kidney_risk: Do not initiate if eGFR <30; discontinue if eGFR falls <30 during treatment
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in severe hepatic impairment (limited data)
medicines.description: Jardiance is a medical formulation containing Empagliflozin as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic (SGLT-2 Inhibitor) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus, Reduction of cardiovascular death in T2DM with CVD.

contraindications: History of angioedema with ACE inhibitor
medicines.kidney_risk: Monitor renal function closely; dose reduction in CrCl <60 mL/min
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Ramipril 5 is a medical formulation containing Ramipril as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive (ACE Inhibitor) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Heart failure post-MI.

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction required in renal impairment
medicines.description: Enalapril 5 is a medical formulation containing Enalapril Maleate as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive (ACE Inhibitor) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Symptomatic heart failure.

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in severe renal impairment (CrCl <30 mL/min)
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Amoxil 500 is a medical formulation containing Amoxicillin as its active salt. It is classified under Antibiotic (Penicillin) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Respiratory tract infections, UTI.

medicines.kidney_risk: Relatively safe in renal impairment (no dose adjustment usually needed)
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment; avoid in severe disease
medicines.description: Doxycycline 100 is a medical formulation containing Doxycycline as its active salt. It is classified under Antibiotic (Tetracycline) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Atypical pneumonia (Mycoplasma, Chlamydia), Malaria prophylaxis.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required in mild-moderate renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Reduce dose in severe hepatic impairment (risk of accumulation)
medicines.description: Metronidazole 400 is a medical formulation containing Metronidazole as its active salt. It is classified under Antiprotozoal / Antibacterial (Nitroimidazole) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Amoebiasis, Giardiasis.

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction required in renal impairment
medicines.description: Cetirizine 10 is a medical formulation containing Cetirizine Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antihistamine (2nd Generation) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Allergic rhinitis (seasonal and perennial), Urticaria.

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction required based on CrCl
medicines.description: Levocetirizine 5 is a medical formulation containing Levocetirizine Dihydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antihistamine (2nd Generation) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Allergic rhinitis, Chronic idiopathic urticaria.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment documented
medicines.liver_risk: Monitor liver enzymes; discontinue if significant elevation
medicines.description: Albendazole 400 is a medical formulation containing Albendazole as its active salt. It is classified under Anthelmintic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Intestinal worms (pinworm, hookworm, roundworm, whipworm), Hydatid disease.

medicines.salt: Sodium Chloride + Potassium Chloride + Sodium Citrate + Glucose
medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution in renal impairment (monitor electrolytes)
medicines.source_name: WHO EML / National Health Portal India
medicines.description: ORS Sachet is a medical formulation containing Oral Rehydration Salts as its active salt. It is classified under Rehydration / Electrolyte and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Dehydration due to diarrhoea, Vomiting.

uses: Adjunct treatment of diarrhoea in children (WHO recommendation)
medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution in renal impairment
medicines.source_name: WHO EML / National Health Portal India
medicines.description: Zinc 20 is a medical formulation containing Zinc Sulphate as its active salt. It is classified under Mineral Supplement / Antidiarrhoeal adjunct and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Adjunct treatment of diarrhoea in children (WHO recommendation), Zinc deficiency.

medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution; monitor potassium and creatinine
medicines.description: Telma H is a medical formulation containing Telmisartan + Hydrochlorothiazide as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive Combination (ARB + Thiazide Diuretic) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension (where monotherapy inadequate).

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction for atenolol component in renal impairment
medicines.description: Amlokind AT is a medical formulation containing Amlodipine + Atenolol as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive Combination (CCB + Beta-Blocker) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Stable angina.

medicines.kidney_risk: Do not exceed 10mg/day in severe renal impairment
medicines.description: Rosuvastatin 10 is a medical formulation containing Rosuvastatin as its active salt. It is classified under Statin / Lipid-lowering and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypercholesterolaemia, Mixed dyslipidaemia.

medicines.kidney_risk: Careful monitoring; INR more variable in renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe hepatic impairment (clotting factors reduced)
medicines.description: Warfarin 2 is a medical formulation containing Warfarin Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under Anticoagulant (Vitamin K Antagonist) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Deep vein thrombosis, Pulmonary embolism.

medicines.kidney_risk: No specific renal dose adjustment, but use with caution
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution; risk of accumulation in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Alprazolam 0.25 is a medical formulation containing Alprazolam as its active salt. It is classified under Benzodiazepine / Anxiolytic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Generalized anxiety disorder, Panic disorder.

medicines.kidney_risk: No specific dose adjustment
medicines.description: Clonazepam 0.5 is a medical formulation containing Clonazepam as its active salt. It is classified under Benzodiazepine / Antiepileptic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Epilepsy (absence, myoclonic, Lennox-Gastaut), Panic disorder.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Reduce dose in hepatic impairment; extensively metabolized by CYP2C9
medicines.description: Phenytoin 100 is a medical formulation containing Phenytoin Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under Antiepileptic (Hydantoin) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Tonic-clonic seizures, Partial seizures.

side_effects: SJS/TEN (especially in HLA-B*1502 carriers — Asian populations)
medicines.kidney_risk: No significant dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution; liver function monitoring required
medicines._india_note: HLA-B*1502 screening recommended for Asian patients before initiation — high SJS/TEN risk in South-East Asian populations per FDA and CDSCO advisory
medicines.source_name: DailyMed / FDA Safety Alert / CDSCO Advisory
medicines.description: Carbamazepine 200 is a medical formulation containing Carbamazepine as its active salt. It is classified under Antiepileptic / Mood Stabilizer and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Epilepsy (partial and generalized tonic-clonic), Trigeminal neuralgia.

contraindications: Pregnancy (highest teratogenicity risk of antiepileptics — neural tube defects, neurodevelopmental effects)
Personal/family history of severe hepatic dysfunction
medicines.kidney_risk: No significant renal dose adjustment
medicines._india_note: Valproate in Pregnancy Prevention Programme: must not be used in women of childbearing age without effective contraception and specialist supervision
medicines.source_name: DailyMed / EMA SmPC / FDA Black Box Warning
medicines.description: Valproate 500 is a medical formulation containing Sodium Valproate as its active salt. It is classified under Antiepileptic / Mood Stabilizer and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Generalized epilepsy, Partial seizures.

side_effects: Suicidal ideation in <25 years (Black Box Warning)
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use lower doses in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Sertraline 50 is a medical formulation containing Sertraline Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antidepressant (SSRI) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Major depressive disorder, OCD.

side_effects: Anticholinergic effects (dry mouth, urinary retention, constipation)
medicines.kidney_risk: No specific dose adjustment
medicines.description: Amitriptyline 10 is a medical formulation containing Amitriptyline Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Tricyclic Antidepressant (TCA) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Depression, Neuropathic pain.

uses: Nausea and vomiting due to chemotherapy
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Ondansetron 4 is a medical formulation containing Ondansetron Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antiemetic (5-HT3 Antagonist) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Nausea and vomiting due to chemotherapy, Post-operative nausea and vomiting.

medicines.kidney_risk: Reduce frequency in severe renal impairment
medicines.description: Domperidone 10 is a medical formulation containing Domperidone as its active salt. It is classified under Prokinetic / Antiemetic (Dopamine Antagonist) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Nausea and vomiting, Gastroparesis.

uses: Prophylaxis of H. influenzae type b and meningococcal disease
side_effects: Orange-red discolouration of body fluids (urine, saliva, tears)
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required for renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe hepatic impairment; strong enzyme inducer affecting many co-medications
medicines._india_note: Strong CYP3A4/CYP2C9 inducer — dramatically reduces plasma levels of many drugs including oral contraceptives, warfarin, antiretrovirals, statins, and antifungals
medicines.description: Rifampicin 450 is a medical formulation containing Rifampicin as its active salt. It is classified under Antitubercular / Antibiotic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Tuberculosis (first-line), Leprosy.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment; monitor for peripheral neuropathy
medicines.liver_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe hepatic disease; LFT monitoring required
medicines._india_note: Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6) supplementation recommended to prevent peripheral neuropathy — standard practice in Indian TB programs
medicines.description: Isoniazid 300 is a medical formulation containing Isoniazid as its active salt. It is classified under Antitubercular and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Tuberculosis (first-line treatment and prophylaxis).

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in severe renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Hydroxychloroquine 200 is a medical formulation containing Hydroxychloroquine Sulphate as its active salt. It is classified under Antimalarial / DMARD and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Rheumatoid arthritis, Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE).

uses: Neuropathic pain (diabetic peripheral neuropathy, post-herpetic neuralgia)
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction REQUIRED in all degrees of renal impairment (renally excreted)
medicines.description: Pregabalin 75 is a medical formulation containing Pregabalin as its active salt. It is classified under Anticonvulsant / Neuropathic pain agent (Gabapentinoid) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Neuropathic pain (diabetic peripheral neuropathy, post-herpetic neuralgia), Fibromyalgia.

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction REQUIRED in renal impairment — renally excreted unchanged
medicines.description: Gabapentin 300 is a medical formulation containing Gabapentin as its active salt. It is classified under Anticonvulsant / Neuropathic pain agent and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Post-herpetic neuralgia, Partial seizures (adjunct).

medicines.kidney_risk: No specific dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines._india_note: Widely misused OTC in India; CDSCO Schedule H. Can worsen diabetes, hypertension, peptic ulcers. Patients on TB treatment may need steroids for certain complications.
medicines.description: Prednisolone 5 is a medical formulation containing Prednisolone as its active salt. It is classified under Corticosteroid and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Asthma exacerbations, Rheumatoid arthritis.

medicines.kidney_risk: AVOID in severe renal impairment (hypercalcaemia risk)
medicines.description: Calcium + D3 (Shelcal) is a medical formulation containing Calcium Carbonate + Vitamin D3 as its active salt. It is classified under Mineral / Vitamin Supplement and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Calcium and Vitamin D deficiency, Osteoporosis prevention.

medicines.salt: Ferrous Sulphate 200mg (equiv. 65mg elemental iron) + Folic Acid 0.5mg
medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution in renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Avoid in liver disease with iron overload
medicines.source_name: WHO EML / National Health Portal India / PMBJP
medicines.description: Iron + Folic Acid (Ferrous Sulphate) is a medical formulation containing Ferrous Sulphate + Folic Acid as its active salt. It is classified under Haematinic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Iron deficiency anaemia, Megaloblastic anaemia.

uses: Neural tube defect prevention in pregnancy
side_effects: Can mask B12 deficiency neurological symptoms (high doses)
contraindications: Pernicious anaemia (must not be used as sole treatment — will mask neurological effects)
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Folic Acid 5mg is a medical formulation containing Folic Acid as its active salt. It is classified under Vitamin B9 supplement and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Megaloblastic anaemia, Neural tube defect prevention in pregnancy.

contraindications: Leber's disease (optic nerve atrophy — cyanocobalamin contraindicated; use hydroxocobalamin instead)
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Vitamin B12 (Cobadex) is a medical formulation containing Cyanocobalamin as its active salt. It is classified under Vitamin B12 supplement and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Vitamin B12 deficiency, Megaloblastic anaemia.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Budesonide Inhaler is a medical formulation containing Budesonide as its active salt. It is classified under Inhaled Corticosteroid (ICS) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Asthma (prophylaxis), COPD (in combination).

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Salbutamol Inhaler is a medical formulation containing Salbutamol (Albuterol) as its active salt. It is classified under Short-acting Beta-2 Agonist (SABA) — Bronchodilator and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Acute asthma attack (rescue), COPD exacerbation (rescue).

contraindications: Hypersensitivity to esomeprazole or substituted benzimidazoles
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Esomeprazole 40 is a medical formulation containing Esomeprazole Magnesium as its active salt. It is classified under Proton Pump Inhibitor (PPI) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of GERD, H. pylori eradication.

medicines.kidney_risk: AVOID in severe renal impairment — aluminium toxicity risk
medicines.description: Digene is a medical formulation containing Aluminium Hydroxide + Magnesium Hydroxide + Simethicone as its active salt. It is classified under Antacid and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Acidity, Heartburn.

uses: Malaria (P. vivax, P. malariae, P. ovale — where sensitive)
contraindications: Known retinal or visual field changes
medicines.kidney_risk: Reduce dose in severe renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Chloroquine 250 is a medical formulation containing Chloroquine Phosphate as its active salt. It is classified under Antimalarial and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Malaria (P. vivax, P. malariae, P. ovale — where sensitive), Amoebiasis (extraintestinal).

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Artemether + Lumefantrine is a medical formulation containing Artemether + Lumefantrine as its active salt. It is classified under Antimalarial (ACT — Artemisinin Combination Therapy) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria.

medicines.kidney_risk: Reduce dose and frequency in renal impairment; avoid in severe impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Reduce dose in hepatic impairment; avoid in severe disease
medicines.description: Tramadol 50 is a medical formulation containing Tramadol Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Opioid Analgesic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Moderate to severe pain, Post-operative pain.

uses: Stroke risk reduction in hypertension with LVH
medicines.kidney_risk: Monitor renal function and potassium; use with caution
medicines.liver_risk: Initiate at lower dose in hepatic impairment (CYP2C9 metabolism)
medicines.description: Losartan 50 is a medical formulation containing Losartan Potassium as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive (ARB) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Diabetic nephropathy in Type 2 diabetes.

contraindications: Concomitant potassium supplements or ARB/ACE inhibitor (risk of hyperkalemia)
medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment due to hyperkalemia risk
medicines.liver_risk: Used in hepatic cirrhosis (with caution); dose titrated to response
medicines.description: Spironolactone 25 is a medical formulation containing Spironolactone as its active salt. It is classified under Potassium-Sparing Diuretic / Aldosterone Antagonist and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Heart failure, Hyperaldosteronism.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required in mild-moderate renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Dose reduction in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Bisoprolol 5 is a medical formulation containing Bisoprolol Fumarate as its active salt. It is classified under Beta-1 Selective Adrenergic Blocker and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Stable heart failure.

side_effects: Digoxin toxicity: nausea, vomiting, visual disturbances (xanthopsia), arrhythmias
medicines.kidney_risk: CRITICAL — digoxin is renally eliminated; severe renal impairment dramatically increases toxicity risk. Dose reduction mandatory. Monitor digoxin levels.
medicines.description: Digoxin 0.25 is a medical formulation containing Digoxin as its active salt. It is classified under Cardiac Glycoside and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Heart failure (reduced ejection fraction), Atrial fibrillation (rate control).

medicines.kidney_risk: Avoid in moderate-severe renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: Hepatotoxicity reported; contraindicated in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Aceclofenac 100 is a medical formulation containing Aceclofenac as its active salt. It is classified under NSAID and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid arthritis.

medicines.kidney_risk: Avoid in renal impairment
medicines.description: Mefenamic Acid 500 is a medical formulation containing Mefenamic Acid as its active salt. It is classified under NSAID (Fenamate) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Dysmenorrhoea, Mild to moderate pain.

contraindications: Concomitant drugs that prolong QT (terfenadine, cisapride, pimozide)
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in renal impairment (renally excreted)
medicines.description: Fluconazole 150 is a medical formulation containing Fluconazole as its active salt. It is classified under Antifungal (Triazole) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Vaginal candidiasis (single dose 150mg), Oropharyngeal candidiasis.

uses: Chronic diarrhoea in inflammatory bowel disease
contraindications: Bacterial enterocolitis (Salmonella, Campylobacter, C. difficile — may worsen)
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Loperamide 2 is a medical formulation containing Loperamide Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiarrhoeal (Opioid Receptor Agonist — peripheral) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Acute non-specific diarrhoea, Chronic diarrhoea in inflammatory bowel disease.

medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Chlorpheniramine 4 is a medical formulation containing Chlorpheniramine Maleate as its active salt. It is classified under Antihistamine (1st Generation) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Allergic rhinitis, Urticaria.

contraindications: Children under 2 years (risk of respiratory depression)
medicines.kidney_risk: Use with caution
medicines._india_note: Indian Benadryl formulation contains Diphenhydramine (unlike US version). Confirm active ingredient on label before safety check.
medicines.description: Cough Syrup DM (Benadryl) is a medical formulation containing Dextromethorphan + Diphenhydramine (formulations vary) as its active salt. It is classified under Antihistamine / Antitussive and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Dry cough, Allergic rhinitis.

medicines.brand_name: Doxylamine + B6 (Unisom variant used in India)
uses: Nausea and vomiting of pregnancy (NVP / morning sickness)
medicines.kidney_risk: No specific dose adjustment
medicines.description: Doxylamine + B6 (Unisom variant used in India) is a medical formulation containing Doxylamine Succinate + Pyridoxine as its active salt. It is classified under Antiemetic / Antihistamine and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Nausea and vomiting of pregnancy (NVP / morning sickness).

medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in significant renal impairment — renally eliminated; toxicity risk markedly increased
medicines._india_note: HIGH ALERT MEDICATION. Weekly dosing only (NOT daily) for RA/psoriasis — daily dosing can be fatal. Folic acid co-supplementation mandatory.
medicines.description: Methotrexate 2.5 is a medical formulation containing Methotrexate as its active salt. It is classified under DMARD / Antineoplastic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Rheumatoid arthritis, Psoriasis.

contraindications: Metabolic acidosis with concomitant metformin (increases risk)
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in renal impairment; nephrolithiasis risk
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Topiramate 50 is a medical formulation containing Topiramate as its active salt. It is classified under Antiepileptic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Partial-onset seizures, Generalized tonic-clonic seizures.

contraindications: Inability to sit or stand upright for 30 min
medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment (CrCl <35 mL/min)
medicines.description: Alendronate 70 is a medical formulation containing Alendronate Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under Bisphosphonate / Antiosteoporotic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Postmenopausal osteoporosis, Steroid-induced osteoporosis.

medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in renal impairment; monitor eGFR and potassium
medicines.description: Lisinopril 10 is a medical formulation containing Lisinopril as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive (ACE Inhibitor) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension, Heart failure.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Nifedipine 10 is a medical formulation containing Nifedipine as its active salt. It is classified under Antihypertensive (Dihydropyridine Calcium Channel Blocker) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Hypertension (modified release preferred), Angina pectoris.

medicines.kidney_risk: No adjustment for pantoprazole; reduce domperidone frequency in severe renal impairment
medicines.liver_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe hepatic impairment (domperidone component)
medicines.description: Pantocid D is a medical formulation containing Pantoprazole + Domperidone as its active salt. It is classified under PPI + Prokinetic Combination and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of GERD with gastroparesis component, Functional dyspepsia.

uses: Lymphatic filariasis (mass drug administration programs in India)
side_effects: CNS effects (rare — crossing BBB in high doses)
contraindications: CNS conditions that affect blood-brain barrier
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Ivermectin 12 is a medical formulation containing Ivermectin as its active salt. It is classified under Antiparasitic and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Strongyloidiasis, Onchocerciasis.

medicines.kidney_risk: AVOID in severe renal impairment — risk of hypercalcaemia
medicines.description: Vitamin D3 60000 IU is a medical formulation containing Cholecalciferol as its active salt. It is classified under Vitamin D Supplement and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Vitamin D deficiency, Osteoporosis prevention.

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Used therapeutically in hepatic encephalopathy — key treatment
medicines.description: Lactulose 10g/15ml is a medical formulation containing Lactulose as its active salt. It is classified under Osmotic Laxative and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Constipation, Hepatic encephalopathy (higher doses).

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment in mild-moderate renal impairment; caution in severe
medicines.description: Tamsulosin 0.4 is a medical formulation containing Tamsulosin Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Alpha-1 Adrenergic Blocker (selective uroselective) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) — symptom relief, Ureteric stones (to facilitate passage).

contraindications: Women of childbearing age (teratogenic — exposure of male fetus to finasteride)
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in hepatic impairment (hepatic metabolism)
medicines.description: Finasteride 5 is a medical formulation containing Finasteride as its active salt. It is classified under 5-Alpha Reductase Inhibitor and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Benign prostatic hyperplasia, Male pattern baldness (1mg, different indication).

medicines.salt: Thiamine 10mg + Riboflavin 10mg + Pyridoxine 3mg + Cyanocobalamin 15mcg + Niacinamide 100mg + Pantothenic Acid 50mg + Folic Acid 1.5mg + Vitamin C 150mg + Biotin 100mcg
medicines.kidney_risk: No specific risk at recommended doses
medicines.description: Multivitamin (Becosules) is a medical formulation containing B-Complex + Vitamin C as its active salt. It is classified under Multivitamin and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Vitamin B complex deficiency, General nutritional supplementation.

contraindications: Hypersensitivity to rabeprazole or substituted benzimidazoles
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Use with caution in severe hepatic impairment
medicines.description: Rabeprazole 20 is a medical formulation containing Rabeprazole Sodium as its active salt. It is classified under Proton Pump Inhibitor (PPI) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of GERD, Peptic ulcer.

uses: Chronic kidney disease (to reduce eGFR decline)
medicines.kidney_risk: Do not initiate for glycaemic control if eGFR <45; can continue for CKD indication per specialist guidance
medicines.description: Dapagliflozin 10 is a medical formulation containing Dapagliflozin as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic (SGLT-2 Inhibitor) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus, Heart failure (HFrEF).

medicines.kidney_risk: CONTRAINDICATED in severe renal impairment
medicines.description: Acarbose 25 is a medical formulation containing Acarbose as its active salt. It is classified under Antidiabetic (Alpha-glucosidase Inhibitor) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (adjunct).

medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.description: Diltiazem 60 is a medical formulation containing Diltiazem Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Calcium Channel Blocker (Non-Dihydropyridine) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Angina pectoris, Hypertension.

contraindications: Sinus node disease / AV block without pacemaker
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines.liver_risk: Contraindicated in severe hepatic impairment; hepatotoxicity risk
language_aliases_hindi: दिल की अनियमित धड़कन की दवा
medicines._india_note: HIGH INTERACTION POTENTIAL — inhibits CYP2C9 and CYP3A4; markedly increases warfarin effect and digoxin levels
medicines.description: Amiodarone 200 is a medical formulation containing Amiodarone Hydrochloride as its active salt. It is classified under Antiarrhythmic (Class III) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Ventricular arrhythmias, Atrial fibrillation (rate and rhythm control).

contraindications: History of QT prolongation or ventricular arrhythmia
Severe hepatic impairment with renal impairment
medicines.kidney_risk: Dose reduction in severe renal impairment (CrCl <30 mL/min)
medicines._india_note: Strong CYP3A4 inhibitor — interacts with statins (especially simvastatin, atorvastatin), warfarin, digoxin, colchicine
medicines.description: Clarithromycin 500 is a medical formulation containing Clarithromycin as its active salt. It is classified under Antibiotic (Macrolide) and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Community-acquired pneumonia, Sinusitis.

contraindications: Concurrent PDE-5 inhibitors (sildenafil, tadalafil, vardenafil) — ABSOLUTE, can cause severe hypotension
medicines.kidney_risk: No dose adjustment required
medicines._india_note: CRITICAL interaction: Absolute contraindication with PDE-5 inhibitors (sildenafil/Viagra, tadalafil/Cialis). Common in India to use both — must warn users.
medicines.description: Nitroglycerine (Sorbitrate) is a medical formulation containing Isosorbide Dinitrate as its active salt. It is classified under Nitrate / Vasodilator and is primarily prescribed for the management or treatment of Acute angina pectoris (acute relief), Prophylaxis of angina.

_missing_fields_note: pregnancy_safe set null where official labeling does not give explicit pregnancy category. All records should be cross-verified against live CDSCO database before production deployment.
